'''Dwi'kar''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] and the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Kothlis system/Legends|Kothlis system]], located within the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
